pageContext.name: King Ghidorah (2019)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and X-plus present the new King Ghidorah (2019) Collectible Figure from Godzilla: King of the Monsters!  This figure is the latest entry in the TOHO Large Kaiju Series and is poised to face Godzilla. King Ghidorah stands with it's wings out-stretched in a menacing pose, and it's neck bent expressing the power of 'Monster Zero'.  Please enjoy the power and the appearance of 'A false king'!
